metadata.title: AI Warfare Technology Maturity Heatmap
metadata.description: Capability readiness assessment across key AI warfare domains

capabilities.name: AI Targeting / ISR Fusion
capabilities.description: Compresses detection-to-action time; triage plus correlation plus speed

capabilities.name: Counter-Drone Kill Chain
capabilities.description: Detect → ID → defeat; AI reduces false alarms and shortens response

capabilities.name: Collaborative Combat Aircraft
capabilities.description: More mass, more sensors, crewed-uncrewed teaming tactics

capabilities.name: GPS-Denied Navigation
capabilities.description: EW breaks GPS; autonomy survives comms loss via visual navigation

capabilities.name: Directed Energy Autonomy
capabilities.description: Microwave magazine depth; autonomy cues directed energy fast

capabilities.name: Undersea Autonomy Fleets
capabilities.description: Persistent ISR/strike undersea without crews - stealth mass

capabilities.name: Mass AI Strike Drones
capabilities.description: Scale plus onboard AI to resist EW, reduce operator load

capabilities.name: Frontier GenAI Agentic
capabilities.description: Planning/analysis plus bounded actions across admin/cyber/data

capabilities.name: Air-Combat AI Agents
capabilities.description: Maneuver recommendations pushes autonomy into high-speed contested loops

capabilities.name: Synthetic Media Detection
capabilities.description: Deepfake verification - operational info warfare defense

capabilities.name: Hypersonic Weapons AI
capabilities.description: Mach 5 plus systems with AI guidance, thermal management

capabilities.name: Lethal Autonomous Weapons (LAWS)
capabilities.description: Select and engage without human intervention - legally constrained
